response.original_title: Michael Clifford: SIDEQUEST LIVE from The Fonda Theatre
response.overview: For the first time ever, Michael Clifford takes center stage as a solo artist. Recorded live at Los Angeles’ iconic Fonda Theatre, this electrifying SIDEQUEST performance transforms the stage into a colorful, video-game-inspired world and delivers the full energy of Clifford’s debut album.  From unforgettable renditions of fan favorites to a surprise cover of Avril Lavigne’s “Complicated,” the show captures Michael’s creativity and connection with the crowd. Special guest appearances from Ryan Hall and Awsten Knight (Waterparks) make this one-night-only event a true milestone.
response.title: Michael Clifford: SIDEQUEST LIVE from The Fonda Theatre
